records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. I managed to infiltrate the ship somehow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. I managed to infiltrate the ship somehow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. I managed to infiltrate the ship somehow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it's so cold in here. Did my spacesuit burn off while I was jumping?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it's so cold in here. Did my spacesuit burn off while I was jumping?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it's so cold in here. Did my spacesuit burn off while I was jumping?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, I can breathe without a spacesuit on. That means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, I can breathe without a spacesuit on. That means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, I can breathe without a spacesuit on. That means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the ship is supplied with oxygen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: the ship is supplied with oxygen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: the ship is supplied with oxygen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this ship? Are aliens on board or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this ship? Are aliens on board or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this ship? Are aliens on board or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh AI, online.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh AI, online.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh AI, online.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unauthorized personnel on board the Exodus Fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unauthorized personnel on board the Exodus Fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unauthorized personnel on board the Exodus Fleet.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Initiating tiered security protocol for forced evictions.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Initiating tiered security protocol for forced evictions.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Initiating tiered security protocol for forced evictions.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exodus Fleet of Humankind, Apostle Simurgh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apostle? Could it mean the Qliphoth Demon Lord's...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apostle? Could it mean the Qliphoth Demon Lord's...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apostle? Could it mean the Qliphoth Demon Lord's...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Protocol confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Protocol confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Protocol confirmed.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Guardian, eliminating hostile entity.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Guardian, eliminating hostile entity.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Guardian, eliminating hostile entity.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those bastards...! Those are the things I saw back at the control facility!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those bastards...! Those are the things I saw back at the control facility!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those bastards...! Those are the things I saw back at the control facility!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, now it all makes sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, now it all makes sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, now it all makes sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The attack on the Administration's control facility, the data corruption of the Administration's strategic satellite,
records.m_Talk_DEU: The attack on the Administration's control facility, the data corruption of the Administration's strategic satellite,
records.m_Talk_FRA: The attack on the Administration's control facility, the data corruption of the Administration's strategic satellite,

records.m_Talk_ENG: intercepting Yaksha's ship and injuring my members,
records.m_Talk_DEU: intercepting Yaksha's ship and injuring my members,
records.m_Talk_FRA: intercepting Yaksha's ship and injuring my members,

records.m_Talk_ENG: and putting everyone in Philharmonic Hall in danger by preventing them from diving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and putting everyone in Philharmonic Hall in danger by preventing them from diving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and putting everyone in Philharmonic Hall in danger by preventing them from diving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all because of this stupid scrap metal...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all because of this stupid scrap metal...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all because of this stupid scrap metal...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>CRF detected.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>CRF detected.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>CRF detected.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Changing to anti-personnel weapon loadout.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Changing to anti-personnel weapon loadout.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Changing to anti-personnel weapon loadout.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crap. Apostle or not, I don't care!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crap. Apostle or not, I don't care!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crap. Apostle or not, I don't care!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I need to do is destroy the ship's power source as quickly as I can and report back to the Headquarters!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I need to do is destroy the ship's power source as quickly as I can and report back to the Headquarters!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I need to do is destroy the ship's power source as quickly as I can and report back to the Headquarters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can feel the Corruption ray from inside the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can feel the Corruption ray from inside the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can feel the Corruption ray from inside the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means that their power source must be all Avesta Drives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means that their power source must be all Avesta Drives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means that their power source must be all Avesta Drives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the location of the power source should be where the Corruption rays are the strongest...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the location of the power source should be where the Corruption rays are the strongest...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the location of the power source should be where the Corruption rays are the strongest...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've come this far, so there's no need to hesitate now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've come this far, so there's no need to hesitate now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've come this far, so there's no need to hesitate now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I knew you'd pull through, Justine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I knew you'd pull through, Justine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I knew you'd pull through, Justine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color> activate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color> activate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color> activate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: KRRRRRAAAAGH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: KRRRRRAAAAGH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: KRRRRRAAAAGH!!
